Description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, lower hips until thighs are parallel to the floor, then stand back up.
Start in a plank position, lower your body until your chest almost touches the floor, then push back up.
Hinge at the hips to grab the barbell, keep your back straight, and stand up by extending hips and knees.
Hang from a bar with an overhand grip, pull your body up until your chin clears the bar.
Hold a push-up position but rest on your forearms, keeping your body in a straight line.
Maintain a steady jogging or running pace to continuously elevate the heart rate.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, curl the weights towards your shoulders while keeping elbows pinned to your sides.
Drop into a squat, kick feet back into a plank, do a push-up, jump feet back to squat, and explosively jump up.
Sit on the floor, lean back slightly, elevate your feet, and twist your torso from side to side.
Step forward with one leg and lower your hips until both knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
